static-brand=C|42|true|true|true|false|false
static-extracted-call=X|false|42|true

super=40|52|41|42
capture=40|41|42|true
yield-star=40|41||true
reevaluation=false|true|false|false|true
static-subclass=false|TypeError:invalid brand on object
outer-resume=key|false|42|true
r3l-class-private-generators-oracle=ok
